sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 254865, "Lagunitas Creek", Stream, CA, Marin Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":254865,"gaz_name":"Lagunitas Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA"} — first point of the multipoint geometry is the creek's mouth on Tomales Bay: lon -122.8269, lat 38.0799, confirmed independently by Wikipedia's infobox mouth coordinate (38.08000, -122.82694); correcting the file's prior coordinate (-122.807, 38.0716), ~2km southeast.

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(53) — Lagunitas Creek and tributaries (Marin Co.)
sources.quotedText: Lagunitas Creek and tributaries (Marin Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: NOAA Fisheries — Identifying Salmon Habitat Restoration Priorities in Lagunitas Creek
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Protects the largest remaining wild coho salmon run in central California and threatened Central California Coast steelhead.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year on Lagunitas Creek and its tributaries
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
